title: - Estimated Hours: 5 hours at $70/hour.
content:
- Estimated Hours: 5 hours at $70/hour.

Email Marketing:

- Strategy Development and List Segmentation: Designing a targeted strategy for lead engagement and nurturing. Tools: Constant Contact.
- Estimated Hours: 6 hours at $60/hour.

- Email Campaign Creation and Execution: Crafting email campaigns to showcase updates and offers.
- Estimated Hours: 4 hours at $65/hour.

Paid Advertising:

- Strategic Campaign Development: Creating targeted ad campaigns for lead generation on Meta platforms. Tools: Facebook Ads Manager.
- Estimated Hours: 3 hours at $90/hour.

- Ad Spend Allocation: $3,000/month dedicated to Meta platform advertising.

SEO and Web Management:

- Comprehensive SEO Strategy: Enhancing online visibility and authority. Tools: SEMrush, Ahrefs.
- Estimated Hours: 4 hours at $85/hour.

- Website and Landing Page Optimization: Maintaining an engaging and fresh website. Tools: Unbounce.
context: From document: Statement of Work (SOW) for Marketing Services for Florida Luxury… — chunk 2 (chunk 2/5)
